# api-keys

The credential your app or SDK uses to push runs in and read data out, unlike `auth login` which signs the CLI in as you. Dashboard: Settings -> API keys.

**When to use:** Minting, listing, or revoking the keys an app or OTLP exporter uses to authenticate to a workspace.

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `create` | `bentolabs api-keys create --data '<json>'` | mint a key; full secret returned once, only on create |
| `list` | `bentolabs api-keys list` | prefixes and metadata, never the secret |
| `revoke` | `bentolabs api-keys revoke <key_id>` | kill a key by id; not workspace-scoped |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs api-keys <command> --help`.
